"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2024.1.4\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\text_search.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\text_search.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\text_search.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\text_search.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o text_search.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtext_search.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\text_search.dir\linkLibs.rsp
